zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald Robert de Dunstanville於大約1054年出生在英國維爾爾卡素 可姆時，他的父親Hugh de Dunstanville27歲，母親Sybila Adela FitzHerbert31歲。他於1080年之前與Adeliza Lisle在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1125年在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald Robert de Dunstanville于大约1054年出生在英国維爾爾卡素 可姆时，他的父亲Hugh de Dunstanville27岁，母亲Sybila Adela FitzHerbert31岁。他于1080年之前与Adeliza Lisle在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1125年在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald Robert de Dunstanville was born about 1054, in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, his father, Hugh de Dunstanville, was 27 and his mother, Sybila Adela FitzHerbert, was 31. He married Adeliza Lisle before 1080, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1125, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald Robert de Dunstanville est né environ 1054, à Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Dunstanville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sybila Adela FitzHerbert, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza Lisle avant 1080, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1125, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald Robert de Dunstanville um 1054 in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Dunstanville 27 und seine Mutter Sybila Adela FitzHerbert 31. Er hat vor 1080 in England Adeliza Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1125 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Adeliza Lisle prima del 1080, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Robert de Dunstanvilleが約1054年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベで生まれた時，父Hugh de Dunstanvilleは27歳，母Sybila Adela FitzHerbertは31歳であった。1080年以前にイギリスでAdeliza Lisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1125年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Reginald Robert de Dunstanville(이)가 대략 1054년 영국 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Dunstanville(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybila Adela FitzHerbert(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1080년 이전 영국에서 Adeliza Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Robert de Dunstanville nasceu aproximadamente 1054, em Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Dunstanville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sybila Adela FitzHerbert, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza Lisle antes 1080, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1125, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald Robert de Dunstanville родился около 1054 г. в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Dunstanville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybila Adela FitzHerbert, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza Lisle перед 1080 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1125 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
